answer_normalization.applied_to: both the parsed and the expected answer, every arm, the axis holdout and all three retention screens
answer_normalization.definition: re.sub(r'\s+', ' ', s).strip(), then re.sub(r'\s*>\s*', '>', s), then re.sub(r'\s*;\s*', ';', s)
answer_normalization.rationale: 21 correct-but-rejected whitespace rows across the three prior gate events (seeds 88014/88015/88016), recorded in experiments/qwen35_4b_axis_stack_readjudication_medium_pilot/analysis/three_event_failure_forensics.md; unchanged since the seed-88021 gate

code_pins_deferred.reason: these files carry orchestrator-filled TODO-PIN constants; each is authenticated by hash inside its own run receipt

episode_success_simulation.definition: a PERFECT canonical enumerator proposes candidates in the frozen order and stops at the unique both-trials fix; from_scratch = canonical index of that fix + 1; remaining_after_tried subtracts the rendered tried prefix

training_streams.covered_by_construction: streams are composed solely of sft_blend.jsonl replay rows and the enum-repair treatment corpus, both checked above
training_streams.policy: zero canonical user-message overlap enforced against every stream file that exists, at generation time and at --check time

mechanism_readings_reported_not_gated.enumeration_fidelity: eval-time per-axis-row booleans (legal / untried / canonical-next), summarized per arm by check_local.py

prerequisites.arm_training_and_merge_receipts: deferred: authenticated at merge/eval time via merge_trained_arm.validate_published_merge

run_order.policy: arm-major: for each arm in the frozen order, the four input files ascending by seed — 12 authenticated engine events

known_taken_nearby.88043: taken as the retention seed of qwen35_4b_counterfactual_plan_reflection_transfer
known_taken_nearby.88047: taken as the reflection seed of qwen35_4b_counterfactual_plan_reflection_transfer
known_taken_nearby.88049: taken as the action seed of qwen35_4b_counterfactual_plan_reflection_transfer

seed_freshness.verified: 88052/88053/88054/88055 verified grep-fresh in seed contexts across experiments/, knowledge/, research_programs/, scripts/, and configs/ at design time (every raw numeric hit is a sha256 or float substring, never a seed); the frozen sequence needed no substitution
